what_was_done: Session 645: Fixed toolshed startup race — added retry with backoff (2,3,5,8,12s) for HTTP backends not ready at startup. Commit 7b1e59b in toolshed repo.

Gate 2: Unicode non-breaking space bypasses rm -rf regex (MEDIUM)
Gate 17: plaintext injection phrases not scanned on PreToolUse (MEDIUM)
2 pre-existing test failures in toolshed: TestStdioBackend (test_spawn, test_cleanup)
